hero.title: We Are The Smile Makers
hero.subtitle: Experience premium dental care in Istanbul, Türkiye

about.title: About FeRa Clinic
about.subtitle: We are The Smile Makers - a premier dental clinic in Istanbul dedicated to transforming lives through exceptional dental care and personalized treatment experiences.
about.story: Founded in 2009, FeRa Clinic began with a simple mission: to provide world-class dental care that combines Turkish hospitality with international medical standards. Our name 'FeRa' represents the perfect balance between precision and artistry in dentistry.
about.whyChooseUsSubtitle: Our commitment to excellence has earned us recognition as a leading dental clinic in Turkey
about.teamSubtitle: Internationally trained specialists dedicated to creating your perfect smile
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we do at FeRa Clinic

treatments.title: Our Comprehensive Treatments
treatments.subtitle: Advanced treatments using latest technology and materials for your perfect smile

contact.title: Get in Touch With Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions about our treatments? Ready to start your smile transformation? Our team is here to help you every step of the way.

cta.title: Need Immediate Assistance?
cta.subtitle: Our team is available 24/7 for emergency consultations and international patient support.
